g.text: ⚡ ⚔ Combat initiated with Syslog Wraith! | Syslog Wraith:
A dark library where the history of the Great Kernel Panic is recorded in scrolling text.
A labyrinth of shifting directories and volatile processes. Error messages echo through
dripping tunnels of corrupted logs. Here, daemons nest in unstable caches, waiting to ambush
Attacks: number keys in the footer · type 'use <item>' or 'flee'
